title: THE ROLE OF ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE IN THE FUTURE OF ENGLISH LANGUAGE TEACHING
author: Turg'unboyeva, Marhabo
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This article examines the role of Artificial Intelligence (AI) in English language teaching.And also its influence on the role of teachers. A quantitative research method was used, and data were collected through a Google Forms survey involving 12 respondents. The findings showed that most participants regularly use AI tools and consider them effective, especially in improving speaking and writing skills. At the same time, the majority of respondents emphasized that teachers still play an important role in the learning process. The study concludes that AI cannot completely replace teachers.Instead,it should be considered a supportive educational tool.
